docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-14-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT THOMAS IVELI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT ANDREA HINMAN IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT THOMAS IVELI WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT THOMAS IVELI DECLINES STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IVELI, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HINMAN, ANDREA $226.46 PRINCIPAL, $29.23 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.69, $226.46 PLUS COSTS AND PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FROM 6/19/17 FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED. PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HINMAN, ANDREA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT IVELI, THOMAS FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
